creator: itavy@itavy.com
text:
after i have searched on porters handbook i have found that there  
is another variable wich can help it and wich is used in many ports  
for dependencies:

   --- Makefile.orig       2009-04-17 11:03:42.000000000 +0300
+++ Makefile    2009-04-21 10:04:57.000000000 +0300
@@ -54,7 +54,8 @@

 .if defined(WITH_APACHELOG)
 .if defined(WITH_APACHE2)
-RUN_DEPENDS+=   
${LOCALBASE}/libexec/apache2/mod_perl.so:${PORTSDIR}/www/mod_perl2
+USE_APACHE=    2.0+
+RUN_DEPENDS+=    
${LOCALBASE}/${APACHEMODDIR}/mod_perl.so:${PORTSDIR}/www/mod_perl2
 .else
 RUN_DEPENDS+=   
${LOCALBASE}/libexec/apache/libperl.so:${PORTSDIR}/www/mod_perl
 .endif

   --
Octavian
